candidate_definitions.text: Official implementation of the paper "Estimation of continuous valence and arousal levels from faces in naturalistic conditions", Antoine Toisoul, Jean Kossaifi, Adrian Bulat, Georgios Tzimiropoulos and Maja Pantic, Nature Machine Intelligence, 2021
